abilities.name: 틀깨기
abilities.description: 특성에 관계없이 상대에게 기술을 쓸 수 있다.

flavorTexts.text: This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight.
The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home.
